daos 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

Retrieve objects matching a pattern from an environment

summon.Rd

Searches an environment for objects whose names match a regular expression and returns them as a named list. Useful for collecting a family of similarly-named objects (e.g. dat0 through dat9) after unpacking a list with unpack_files().

Usage

summon(pattern, .envir = parent.frame())

Arguments

pattern

A single regular expression string.

.envir

The environment to search. Default is the calling environment.

Value

A named list of matching objects.

See also

unpack_files(), split_by()

Examples

dat1 <- data.frame(x = 1)
dat2 <- data.frame(x = 2)
dat3 <- data.frame(x = 3)
summon("^dat\\d+$")
#> $dat1
#>   x
#> 1 1
#> 
#> $dat2
#>   x
#> 1 2
#> 
#> $dat3
#>   x
#> 1 3
#>
